svg.text: Skyline AI Bridge — C4 Container Diagram
Plain-English cross-chain bridging · AI extracts intent · deterministic router picks the rail · the user signs every transaction
Full app — this Next.js repo (Rails A·B·C)
API ROUTES (server — secrets, rate limits, CORS proxy)
src/lib — SHARED LOGIC (the brains; the LLM has no say here)
The review card and the signed transaction calldata are built by the SAME function (build.ts) from the SAME zod-validated Intent.
tests/equivalence.test.ts asserts they can never diverge. The AI emits JSON only — it never picks the rail and never signs.
